title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 469.340 - Uniformity of interpretation
text:
469.340.  Uniformity of interpretation. — This law shall be so interpreted and construed as to effectuate its general purpose to make uniform the law of those states which enact it.
(L. 1959 S.B. 121 § 12, A.L. 2004 H.B. 1511) 
Transferred 2004; formerly 456.340
